label: plain_text
text:
1.
Only
the last three
digits
when
deciding
if a
matter
given number is divisible by 8.
2.
If the number formed by the last three digits is divisible
by 8, then the original number is divisible by 8.
3.
If the original number is divisible by 8, then the number
formed by the last three digits is divisible by 8.
